# SheetJS CE 0.20.3

Vendored browser build for deterministic local XLSX import.

- Version: `0.20.3`
- Upstream: `https://cdn.sheetjs.com/xlsx-0.20.3/package/dist/xlsx.full.min.js`
- Upstream documentation: `https://docs.sheetjs.com/docs/getting-started/installation/standalone/`
- License: Apache License 2.0 (`LICENSE`)
- `xlsx.full.min.js` SHA-256: `cc015130aa8521e7f088f88898eba949ccdcbfb38df0bd129b44b7273c3a6f41`
- `LICENSE` SHA-256: `4d2a38ac35cda06a555c84074a819d413339cd3691b822cae50f8f322fe01f64`

The standalone build exposes `window.XLSX`. Keep the version and checksums in this file synchronized when upgrading.
